vc_checking.failure_layer: C intermediate assertion / address identity preservation
vc_checking.summary: The entry entailment is definitionally proofable, but both return witnesses quantify linklist_pre and linklist independently. Their preconditions own the complete circular-list resources at linklist, while their postconditions require xizi_dll at linklist_pre, with no equality connecting the two addresses. This is a semantic annotation gap and cannot be repaired by a Rocq tactic or group-local helper.

post_spatial: xizi_dllseg first head head last l

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: Unfold xizi_dll linklist_pre l and reuse its existing existential witnesses first and last.
witness_analyses.space_plan: Unfold xizi_dll once; the unfolded body is exactly the required three-resource separating conjunction, modulo existential order/associativity.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: No pure conclusion is required; PreH1 is not needed.

used_existing_lemmas.statement_shape: EX first last, head.next |-> first ** head.prev |-> last ** xizi_dllseg first head head last nodes

witness_analyses.recommended_next_phase: vc-proving only after the return-witness annotation bug is repaired and source_goal_version is regenerated
witness_analyses.grouping_reason: A direct definition-unfold witness with no helper dependency.

pre_spatial: xizi_dllseg first linklist linklist last l
post_exists: the first/last witnesses hidden by xizi_dll at linklist_pre

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: No valid instantiation exists for the postcondition head address: the precondition supplies resources at linklist, not at the independent universal variable linklist_pre.
witness_analyses.space_plan: Impossible under the frozen statement. Unfolding xizi_dll would require the two head-field cells at linklist_pre; the heap resources are at linklist and no equality or substitution premise relates these addresses.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: The non-empty branch fact itself is derivable by destructing l: if l=nil, xizi_dllseg simplifies to first=linklist, contradicting PreH1. This does not repair the missing spatial head identity.

premise_discharge.premise: linklist_pre = linklist, needed to retarget the owned head fields

witness_analyses.failure_signal: goal.v lines 46-49 own resources at linklist, while lines 53 and 62 require xizi_dll linklist_pre l; linklist_pre and linklist are independent forall binders.
witness_analyses.semantic_counterexample_shape: Choose linklist=h, first=r<>h, last=r, l=[r], with the sentinel fields at h and one circular data-node at r satisfying xizi_dllseg r h h r [r]. Choose a fresh linklist_pre=p distinct from h and r. P owns no fields at p, so xizi_dll p [r] cannot be constructed.
witness_analyses.grouping_reason: Excluded from proving because the frozen VC is not semantically valid.

pre_spatial: xizi_dllseg first linklist linklist last l
post_exists: the first/last witnesses hidden by xizi_dll at linklist_pre

witness_analyses.witness_instantiation: No valid head-address instantiation exists because linklist_pre is universally fixed and unrelated to linklist.
witness_analyses.space_plan: Impossible under the frozen statement for the same address-identity reason as return_wit_1. The empty-list case already supplies a direct counterexample.
witness_analyses.pure_plan: For the intended same-head specification, first=linklist together with the circular segment shape is the empty case; however, even granting the pure facts, the post spatial assertion remains at the unrelated address linklist_pre.

premise_discharge.premise: linklist_pre = linklist, needed to retarget the owned head fields

witness_analyses.failure_signal: goal.v lines 85-88 and 95-98 own resources at linklist, while lines 92 and 101 require xizi_dll linklist_pre l; no equality connects the two forall binders.
witness_analyses.semantic_counterexample_shape: Take l=nil and first=last=linklist=h. Then xizi_dllseg h h h h nil is pure-and-emp, so P consists of the two sentinel field cells at h. Choose a fresh linklist_pre=p<>h. Q requires sentinel field cells at p, which the heap does not own.
witness_analyses.grouping_reason: Excluded from proving because the frozen VC is not semantically valid.

proof_groups.natural_language_proof_pattern: Unfold xizi_dll, select the definition's first/last existential witnesses, and close the identical spatial body by cancellation/associativity.
proving_hints: No case-lib helper should be added.
proof_groups.reason: This is the only currently proofable witness and is a direct definition-unfold obligation. One group minimizes worker count while keeping semantically invalid return witnesses out of proving.

group_plan.invalidation_reason: Any annotation repair and canonical symbolic-execution refresh will create a new source_goal_version and invalidate this provisional proofable-witness grouping.

annotation_repair_recommendation.required_property: Preserve a single logical head address across Require, the intermediate Assert, and Ensure so generated return witnesses use the same address for owned resources and xizi_dll.
annotation_repair_recommendation.conservative_pattern: Introduce an explicit logical head in With; Require linklist == head and xizi_dll(head,l); carry linklist == head (or use head consistently) in the intermediate predicate-first assertion; Ensure xizi_dll(head,l).
must_preserve: the l=nil iff first=head intended emptiness distinction
next_checks: rerun canonical symbolic execution and diagnostics split
verify refreshed return witnesses no longer quantify unrelated linklist_pre/linklist heads
rerun vc-checking against the new source_goal_version

evidence.coq_check_reason: vc-checking is a read-only semantic planning phase; the semantic counterexamples make proving feedback inapplicable.

timing.major_time_reason: Constructing an explicit satisfiable non-empty circular-list precondition to demonstrate that the head-address mismatch is semantic rather than merely a missing tactic.
